source_file: Closed End Second - Standard and Alt Doc (1).pdf
program: Closed End Second - Standard and Alt Doc
loan_purpose: Stand-Alone Cash Out (minimum 6 months ownership required)
Simultaneous Purchase (First Lien must be Agency-eligible loan)
product_type: Fixed Rate - Fully amortizing terms of 10, 15, 20, 25 & 30 years
declining_market: Maximum CLTV limited to 80% for all transactions
ineligible_loan_features: Unseasoned cash-out (existing lien is cash-out within 6 months note date to note date)
Frequent Refinances (2+ cash-out refinances in past 12 months)
All existing subordinate liens must be satisfied (except solar panels per Verus Seller Guide)
All Solar Panel loans and leases with PACE/HERO financing must be paid off

standard_doc.wage_salary: Paystubs, 1 or 2 years W-2's, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
standard_doc.self_employed: 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C

personal_bank_statements.months: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business bank statements
personal_bank_statements.qualifying_income: Total eligible deposits from 12 or 24 months divided by number of statements
personal_bank_statements.business_statements: Must reflect business activity and transfers to personal account

analysis_methods: Expense ratio from 3rd party (CPA, EA, tax preparer) min ratio 10%
3rd party prepared P&L Statement (CPA, EA, tax preparer)

irs_form_1099.ytd_documentation: Required to support continued receipt of income

written_voe.bank_statements: 2 most recent months personal bank statements reflecting employer deposits

du_or_lpa.not_allowed: Ineligible, Caution, or Refer with Caution

underwriting_requirements.eligibility_criteria: Follow Closed End Second chapter in Non-Agency Seller Guide for criteria not in matrix

required: Default interest rate on Note cannot exceed Note rate
If IO and/or ARM, terms of Note to be reviewed
Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement
ineligible_first_liens: Forbearance/modifications/deferrals completed or reinstated within 12 months of Note date
Loans in active forbearance or deferment
Balloon if payment becomes due during amortization period of new 2nd lien
Loans secured by more than one property (cross collateralized or blanket mortgages)
Note with default interest rate greater than Note rate

credit_and_fraud: Gap credit report or Undisclosed Debt Monitoring (UDM) Fraud report
underwriting_requirements.qualifying_credit_score: Representative credit score of borrower with highest qualifying income
first_lien_payment_verification: Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24 months w/activity in last 12 months or 3 reporting 12 months w/recent activity

underwriting_requirements.assets: Verification required if funds needed to consummate transaction

dti.qualifying_payment_standalone: Utilize senior lien mortgage payment from credit report
dti.fixed_rate: Note rate amortized over total term
dti.arms: Higher of fully indexed rate or note rate
dti.interest_only: Qualifying rate amortized over remaining term after IO expiration

appraisal_requirements.hpml_non_qm: Full appraisal with interior inspection required regardless of loan balance

options: AVM from approved vendor with acceptable FSD score + new Property Condition Report (AVM max 90 days old at closing)
Exterior Drive-By appraisal (Hybrid or 2055 or 1075) - 1 unit only
Prior 1st lien appraisal within 12 months (same lender + new Property Condition Report + recertification by original appraiser)
Broker Price Opinion (BPO) from Clear Capital, Consolidated Analytics, Computershare, or Stewart Valuation Intelligence
Prior 1st lien appraisal within 12 months (same lender + new Property Condition Report + recertification + AVM; lower of prior appraisal or AVM for CLTV)
Collateral Underwriter (CU) or Loan Collateral Advisor (LCA) - score 2.5 or less; if exceeds 2.5, need enhanced desk review, field review, or second appraisal
Enhanced desk review: ARR (Stewart Valuation Intelligence), CDA (Clear Capital), CCA (Consolidated Analytics), VRR (Homegenius Real Estate), Valreview (Valligent/Veros)
AVM from approved vendor with acceptable FSD score (if primary is AVM, review must be different vendor)
secondary_valuation.enhanced_desk_review_bpo_variance: If value more than 10% below appraised value or cannot validate, need field review or second appraisal
secondary_valuation.two_avms: Higher FSD score = primary; second must support within 10%; if same FSD, use lower property value for CLTV
secondary_valuation.two_bpos: Lowest value = primary; must be completed by different brokers

property_condition_report: When required, exterior photo + rating of physical condition and characteristics (e.g., Clear Capital Property Condition Inspection)
recently_listed_properties: Properties listed for sale or previously listed within past 6 months are NOT eligible

loan_lte_250k: Owner and Encumbrance Report (O&E) with current grantee, liens, involuntary liens, judgements, property tax info, legal description
ALTA Short Form Residential Limited Coverage Junior Loan Policy

flood.flood_zone: Evidence of insurance coverage per HFIAA; loss payee clause must reflect seller as additional insured

short_term_rental.notes: Not mentioned as eligible. This is a 2nd lien product.
